30c95687-6fcc-4cb9-bd56-a28d4e5e76e1.text: Because it is best suited for quick local demos without requiring additional installation of PostgreSQL, Milvus, or Elasticsearch.

dfa98b2d-2193-41f1-af51-9393e34cb643.text: VectorStore is used to store document vectors and perform similarity search. In demo scenarios, you can prioritize using SimpleVectorStore because it doesn't depend on external databases and is suitable for quick local prototyping.

f1e17103-fd3e-4519-999a-538315a291c9.text: Alibaba Bailian is a large model service platform provided by Alibaba Cloud, and DashScope is its model API invocation entry point. Developers typically invoke model capabilities through an API Key.

0dbc16a8-5d69-4f83-9aa6-cfc5b8fbae74.text: Recommended to inject API Key through environment variable AI_DASHSCOPE_API_KEY. Common configuration item in Spring AI Alibaba is spring.ai.dashscope.api-key.

4b35e9cf-e01a-4083-9d15-95ac9acff89f.text: Suitable for answering questions that are "clearly written in the knowledge base", such as: What chat model does this demo use? What embedding model does this demo use? How to rebuild the index?

metadata.title: What questions is it suitable for?

fe1e9d66-361d-4553-aed5-2e48f00bcabd.text: Replace the markdown files in the src/main/resources/kb/ directory with your business documents, then call /rag/rebuild to rebuild the index.

metadata.title: How to replace the knowledge base?

2118c019-3673-474f-8fcc-5211e672bde0.text: text-embedding-v3: Suitable for semantic search and RAG. text-embedding-v3 supports multiple dimensions, common optional dimensions include 1024, 768, 512, 256, 128, 64.

27883cb8-4f87-4e5e-8067-26b46d811a56.text: In a minimal RAG application: First use the embedding model to embed knowledge base documents after splitting. Save vectors to the vector store. When a user asks a question, first perform similarity search. Then append retrieved fragments to the prompt for the chat model to answer.

570bffd6-99b9-46fc-8280-0ea0002add1b.text: qwen-plus: Suitable for most general Q&A and application integration scenarios. qwen-turbo: Lower cost, suitable for lightweight Q&A. qwen-max: More capable, suitable for complex tasks.

bf862e1d-5e8d-4428-99d4-bd1a75763d7d.text: QuestionAnswerAdvisor is one of the easiest RAG integration approaches in Spring AI. When a user asks a question, it will: First retrieve relevant document fragments from VectorStore; Then append these fragments to the prompt; Finally pass it to the chat model to generate an answer.

f3ed592e-10bb-4f3a-94a2-9988dfeff7a2.text: A minimal knowledge base import process typically involves: Reading documents using MarkdownDocumentReader or PDF Reader; Splitting documents using TokenTextSplitter; Building the index by calling vectorStore.add().

2d4bdac5-0e9b-4c33-b1da-2bcfff617d0a.text: ChatClient is a unified chat invocation entry point provided by Spring AI, suitable for initiating prompt calls directly in business code.

0fcfa8f9-0fb7-4129-8582-787c4c854dca.text: This demo uses Spring Boot, Spring AI, Spring AI Alibaba, DashScope, SimpleVectorStore, and Markdown documents.

metadata.title: What tech stack does this demo use?

c1cdb7c4-23bd-4f3d-8d7b-ad687599dfc4.text: When the question is not present in the knowledge base documents, or when relevant fragments are not retrieved, the system should answer "I don't know".

metadata.title: When will it answer "I don't know"?
